content.intro: After generating an AST agreement, you can send it for electronic signatures. All parties sign online, and you receive a fully executed document when complete.

steps.title: Generate the agreement
steps.content: Complete the agreement wizard and click 'Generate Agreement'. The document will be created as a PDF.

steps.title: Preview the document
steps.content: Review the generated agreement to ensure all details are correct before sending.

steps.title: Click 'Send for Signing'
steps.content: Click the 'Send for Signing' button to initiate the signature process.

steps.title: Confirm recipients
steps.content: Verify the email addresses for all signatories (tenants and landlord) are correct.

steps.title: Send invitations
steps.content: Click 'Send' to email signature requests to all parties.

sections.title: Signing Order
sections.content: By default, all tenants sign first, followed by the landlord or agent. Each party receives an email with a secure link to view and sign the document.

sections.title: Tracking Progress
sections.content: Check the Agreement History page to see signing status. The status column shows: 'Draft' (not yet sent), 'Awaiting Signatures' (sent but not complete), or 'Signed' (fully executed).

sections.title: Resending Invitations
sections.content: If a party hasn't signed, you can resend the signing invitation from the agreement detail page. Click the actions menu and select 'Resend Invitation'.

sections.title: Completed Agreements
sections.content: Once all parties have signed, the executed agreement is automatically emailed to everyone and stored in Agreement History for download.
